content:
# Rivian Software Engineering Intern - Product Manager Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Rivian Software Engineering Intern - Product Manager internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Palo Alto, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Rivian
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Rivian is offering a Software Engineering Intern - Product Manager internship position in Palo Alto, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Rivian's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Rivian interview and increase your chances of success.
